opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Lightning keeps shooting down my leg, and I can't even stand up to get to the bathroom.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has got much worse over the last couple of days and I can't walk or sleep — I need something for it tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: it's been building up over the last two days or so
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours of it being really bad now, but the back trouble is old
symptom_narrative.character: electric and burning, like lightning shooting down my leg
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I can't put any weight on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: starts in my lower back and shoots down my leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's pretty much constant, keeps waking me up all night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps, I just try to keep still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand up or put weight on the leg makes it awful
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the pain and not being able to move — nothing else I can think of
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had back problems for years since a slipped disc, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically stuck in bed — I can't get to the toilet or get myself a drink safely

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing back pain after a slipped disc
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually painkillers and it settles down

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took the most I'm allowed on the packet

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own, no one here to help me tonight, and there's stuff on the floor between the bed and the bathroom — I'm scared I'll fall trying to get there

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff while in significant pain and distress
may be elevated by pain and distress rather than reflecting resting rate
